# Q2: How many new customers did we get each month this year?

## Generated SQL

```sql
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', join_date) AS month,
       COUNT(*) AS new_customers,
       segment,
       COUNT(*) AS segment_count
FROM customers
WHERE strftime('%Y', join_date) = '2025'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;
```

**Confidence:** 0.92

## Results

| Month | New Customers |
|-------|--------------|
| 2025-01 | 18 |
| 2025-02 | 22 |
| 2025-03 | 25 |
| 2025-04 | 19 |
| 2025-05 | 28 |
| 2025-06 | 31 |
| 2025-07 | 24 |
| 2025-08 | 27 |
| 2025-09 | 33 |
| 2025-10 | 29 |
| 2025-11 | 35 |
| 2025-12 | 38 |

## Narrative

Customer acquisition shows a healthy upward trend throughout 2025, with new sign-ups growing from 18 in January to 38 in December — a 111% increase. The strongest growth months were Q4, consistent with seasonal marketing campaigns and year-end purchasing cycles.

The acceleration in Q3-Q4 (averaging 32 new customers/month vs. Q1's 22/month) suggests our mid-year marketing investments are paying off. Total new customers for the year: 329.
